postconditions: result == (has_tx_index == 1 && has_receipt == 1 && receipt_tx_id_matches == 1 && index_key_matches_tx_id == 1 && loc_matches_position == 1 && receipt_matches_position == 1 && index_matches_position == 1 && block_number > 0)
acceptance_criteria: An included transaction is safe only when tx index, receipt, tx id, location, receipt position, and index position evidence are all 1-valued and the block number is nonzero.

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core included_tx_requires_receipt_index_and_position_evidence && cargo test -p ic-evm-core produce_block_selects_top_k_by_fee_then_submission_order
test_evidence.test_name: verified-core included tx evidence cases plus evm-core block production adapter test
